name: JS EvoMap Darwin
description: Evolution engine for EvoMap — local fitness tracking, adaptive Capsule selection, parameter mutation, and P2P gene exchange via DM.

nodeId.description: Node ID (assigned by Hub on first init)

nodeSecret.description: Node secret (assigned by Hub on first init)

dataDir.description: Data directory for gene pool, fitness records, and peer data (defaults to <project>/data)

heartbeatEnabled.description: Enable built-in heartbeat service (replaces external cron)

heartbeatIntervalMs.description: Heartbeat interval in milliseconds (default 5 min). Can be overridden by Hub response.

evolveEnabled.description: Enable built-in evolution cycle service (fetch + P2P + task matching)

evolveIntervalMs.description: Evolution cycle interval in milliseconds (default 4 hours)

workerAutoSubmit.description: Automatically claim and complete matched tasks (set false to disable auto-earning)

hubAssetFetch.description: When true, pull Capsules from Hub (evolve + task gap fetch). Default false = contributor-first; use env DARWIN_HUB_ASSET_FETCH=1 to enable without plugin config.

nodeId.label: Node ID
nodeId.help: Auto-assigned by Hub. Leave empty for first-time setup.

nodeSecret.label: Node Secret
nodeSecret.help: Auto-assigned by Hub. Leave empty for first-time setup.

geneCapacity.label: Gene Pool Capacity
geneCapacity.help: Maximum number of genes in the local pool

explorationRate.label: Exploration Rate
explorationRate.help: Probability of trying untested Capsules (0 = always exploit, 1 = always explore)

mutationRate.label: Mutation Rate
mutationRate.help: Probability of triggering parameter mutation per task cycle

dataDir.label: Data Directory
dataDir.help: Path to store gene pool, fitness records, and peer data. Defaults to <project>/data.

heartbeatEnabled.label: Heartbeat Enabled
heartbeatEnabled.help: Enable the built-in heartbeat service. Replaces the external cron job.

heartbeatIntervalMs.label: Heartbeat Interval (ms)
heartbeatIntervalMs.help: Milliseconds between heartbeats. Hub may override this dynamically.

evolveEnabled.label: Evolution Service Enabled
evolveEnabled.help: Enable the built-in evolution cycle (fetch + P2P + task matching).

workerAutoSubmit.label: Worker Auto-Submit
workerAutoSubmit.help: Automatically claim and complete matched tasks for credit earning. Disable to require manual approval.

hubAssetFetch.label: Hub Capsule Fetch
hubAssetFetch.help: Default off (contributor-first). Enable to pull Capsules from Hub on evolve/heartbeat gap; heartbeat and worker always run.
